message:
chore(beads): ft-xbnl0.2.4 tick 436 — primitive doc annotations for cancel gap

Attaches tick-436 bead comment noting the primitive-wrapper doc
additions (commit 468794b9). Three recv primitives now have
"Cancellation semantics" sections citing the pinned tests and
workaround pattern — consistent with the ticks 328/331 precedent
for sleep/timeout. Local count 106/106 (unchanged; doc-only tick).
